forecast-period.text: Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Cloudy. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 19.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, most likely at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h before dawn then increasing to 30 to 45 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h decreasing to 20 to 30 km/h in the early morning then shifting south to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning and early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers in the west, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northwesterly 30 to 40 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. Winds northwesterly 25 to 40 km/h turning southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning then becoming west to southwesterly and light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northwesterly 20 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h shifting west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Mostly clear. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northerly 20 to 30 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming north to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 20.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 11 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northerly 20 to 30 km/h shifting southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 25 to 35 km/h before dawn. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Winds easterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northeasterly during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h turning northerly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.
Mostly sunny. Winds north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 14 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
Sun protection 11:40am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely from the late morning. Winds north to northwesterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 19.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower, most likely in the evening. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning easterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching between 14 and 21.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 23.
Cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Nullarbor, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain west of Ceduna, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the late evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 15 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sun protection 12:20pm to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending south to southwesterly before dawn then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 10 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers west of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the south at night. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 30 to 40 km/h in the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 14 with daytime temperatures reaching the low to mid 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h shifting southerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning east to northeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northerly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 8 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 20.
Cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Cloudy. High chance of showers near the west coast, medium chance elsewhere. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h increasing to 45 km/h before turning northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 13 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid 20s.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of rain, most likely in the morning. Winds northwest to southwesterly 20 to 30 km/h becoming southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 12 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 19.
Partly cloudy. Winds northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers in the far west, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northerly 25 to 40 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 13 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching the mid to high 20s.
Sun protection 11:00am to 2:00pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the early morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 25.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers in the far west, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm south of Coober Pedy in the evening. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 7 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching between 19 and 24.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Coober Pedy, medium chance elsewhere. The chance of a thunderstorm west of Coober Pedy. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching 20 to 25.
Clear. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Sunny. Winds east to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending north to northeasterly 25 to 35 km/h in the morning then tending east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 13 with daytime temperatures reaching 23 to 28.
Sun protection 11:00am to 1:30pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, slight chance elsewhere. Winds northwest to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwest to southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the late afternoon then tending southeast to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 11 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 18 and 29.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower south of Leigh Creek, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h tending northeast to southeasterly during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 15 with daytime temperatures reaching between 17 and 27.

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Yunta, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 9 and 16 with daytime temperatures reaching 21 to 28.
